meta.name: MagnetaServiceFee — accept ownership (cronos)
meta.description: Second leg of Ownable2Step: Safe 0x40ea2908Ea490d58E62D1Fd3364464D8A857b297 accepts ownership of MagnetaServiceFee 0x0FfBa7A785223CaD90402Fb6027ee0C74aB99945 on cronos. Run AFTER deployServiceFee.ts (transferOwnership already done by deployer). Fees are OFF (opFee=0) until a later setOpFee.
